widgets.title: Salary Over Hire Date
widgets.description: Trend of salary over the hire date of employees.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT date_trunc('month', "hire_date") AS x, CAST(AVG("salary") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_hr_employees" GROUP BY x ORDER BY x ASC

widgets.title: Salary vs Performance Score Correlation
widgets.description: Correlation between employee salary and performance score.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST("salary" AS DOUBLE) AS x, "performance_score" AS y FROM "t_hr_employees" GROUP BY "salary", "performance_score" ORDER BY x ASC, y ASC

widgets.title: Name × Department Heatmap
widgets.description: A heatmap showing the distribution of employees across different departments.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "name" AS row, "department" AS col, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_hr_employees" GROUP BY "name", "department" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400

widgets.title: Name Composition by Department
widgets.description: This visualization shows the composition of employees by department.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "department" AS "group", "name" AS "label", CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS "value" FROM "t_hr_employees" GROUP BY "department", "name" ORDER BY "value" DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Performance Score Volume Over Hire Date
widgets.description: This visualization shows the volume of performance scores over the hire date of employees.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT date_trunc('month', "hire_date") AS x, CAST(SUM("performance_score") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_hr_employees" GROUP BY x ORDER BY x ASC
